title: Create Completed
description: Modpack on neoforge featuring create, create addons, optimization and QoL mods
body:
# Create Compleated

**Create Compleated** is a modpack built around the amazing **Create** mod, packed with addons that expand gameplay, plus performance and QoL improvements to make everything smoother.  
You can build huge factories without worrying about your game turning into a slideshow – no 5 FPS here! Just pure, creative, and lag-free automation fun.


## What's Inside:
- 📦 **Full set of Create addons** – new mechanics, blocks, and tools.
- ⚙️ **Performance optimizations** – smoother gameplay even on lower-end PCs.
- 🎯 **Quality of Life mods** – improved controls, better UI, and handy shortcuts.
- 🔧 **Balanced and compatible** – all mods work together seamlessly.


## Configuration
All settings are pre-configured for the best experience.  
If you prefer the default mod settings, simply delete the `config` folder to restore them.

## Multiplayer
You can play both in **singleplayer** and **online** – as long as both the server and the client have the same modpack installed.  
To quickly host for friends, just open your world to LAN. The IP address to join will then appear in chat for everyone to use.
